ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "total_school_budget" INTEGER /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget per student */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "percent_passing_math" REAL /* Percentage of students passing the math test */,
  "percent_passing_reading" REAL /* Percentage of students passing the reading test */,
  "percent_overall_passing" REAL /* Overall percentage of students passing both math and reading tests */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "year_established" TEXT /* Year the school was established */,
  "historical_notes" TEXT /* Historical notes about the school */,
  "percent_white" REAL /* Percentage of white students */,
  "percent_black" REAL /* Percentage of black students */,
  "percent_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic students */,
  "percent_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian students */,
  "percent_other" REAL /* Percentage of students of other races/ethnicities */,
  "percent_low_income" REAL /* Percentage of students from low-income families */,
  "percent_special_education" REAL /* Percentage of students with special education needs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "avg_students" INTEGER /* Average number of students per school of this type */,
  "avg_budget" INTEGER /* Average budget per school of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "math_score" REAL /* Math score of the student */,
  "reading_score" REAL /* Reading score of the student */,
  "passing_math" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student passed the math test */,
  "passing_reading" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student passed the reading test */,
  "overall_passing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student passed both math and reading tests */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the student */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the student */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent/guardian */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Special needs or health conditions of the student */,
  "disciplinary_actions" TEXT /* Disciplinary actions taken against the student */,
  "attendance_record" TEXT /* Attendance record of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the budget is allocated to */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the budget */,
  "total_budget" INTEGER /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "budget_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget */,
  "salaries" INTEGER /* Amount allocated to salaries */,
  "supplies" INTEGER /* Amount allocated to supplies */,
  "utilities" INTEGER /* Amount allocated to utilities */,
  "educational_resources" INTEGER /* Amount allocated to educational resources */,
  "administrative_costs" INTEGER /* Amount allocated to administrative costs */,
  "previous_year_budget" INTEGER /* Total budget for the previous year */,
  "budget_changes" TEXT /* Changes in the budget compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_funding_sources FOREIGN KEY ("funding_sources") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "test_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the test */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test type */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "score" REAL /* Score obtained by the student */,
  "passing_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the student passed the test */,
  "question_1_score" REAL /* Score for the first question */,
  "question_2_score" REAL /* Score for the second question */,
  "question_3_score" REAL /* Score for the third question */,
  "percentile_rank" REAL /* Percentile rank of the student's score */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional performance metrics (e.g., speed, accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  "passing_threshold" REAL /* Passing threshold for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "total_amount" INTEGER /* Total amount of funding from this source */,
  "percentage_of_budget" REAL /* Percentage of the total budget this source represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the administrator is responsible for */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., Principal, Vice Principal) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the administrator */,
  "additional_contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information of the administrator */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the administrator */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_administrators_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions and access levels for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
